executive_summary: Pre-upgrade risk assessment (model v2.0.0): overall recommendation is BLOCK with a composite score of 81/100 across 81 CVE(s) (1 BLOCK, 0 REVIEW).

per_cve.paragraph: CVE-2020-1747 scores 81/100 (BLOCK). CVSS 9.8 contributes 40 severity points. The //admin/config entry point reaches `yaml.load` in :0 via a 1-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2020-5313 scores 31/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 7.1 contributes 20 severity points. The //tasks/<id>/upload entry point reaches `PIL.Image.open` in :0 via a 1-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2018-1000656 scores 30/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 7.5 contributes 13 severity points. The //api/data entry point reaches `api_data` in app.py:27 via a 1-hop call-graph path. Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.12. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2019-10906 scores 26/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 8.6 contributes 13 severity points. The //tasks/<id> entry point reaches `jinja2.sandbox.SandboxedEnvironment` in :0 via a 1-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2025-66471 scores 16/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 7.5 contributes 13 severity points. The /tasks.py entry point reaches `_load_template_source` in tasks.py:17 via a 2-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2023-32681 scores 12/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 6.1 contributes 13 severity points. The /auth.py entry point reaches `requests.sessions.Session.rebuild_auth` in auth.py:10 via a 2-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.
